parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: Receives image data while Active is on.

parameters.name: name
parameters.label: Source Name
parameters.description: Select which source stream to use.

parameters.name: extraips
parameters.label: Extra Search IPs
parameters.description: By default NDI searches using mDNS, which is usually limited to locate networks. To find sources available on machines not reachable by mDNS, this parameter can be filled with a space-separated list o

parameters.name: bandwidth
parameters.label: Bandwidth
parameters.description: Choose High or Low bandwidth option.

parameters.name: hwdecode
parameters.label: Hardware Decode
parameters.description: Enable hardware decode for NDI|HX encoded video streams. Hardware decoding is not supported for native NDI codec, only NDI|HX (which is H264). The and other software based NDI solutions can only send

parameters.name: inputcolorspace
parameters.label: Input Color Space
parameters.description: Controls what color space the input data will be treated as. It will be converted to the Working when uploaded to the .

parameters.name: inputreferencewhite
parameters.label: Input Reference White
parameters.description: When converting the input color values to the Working Color Space, this controls how they should be treated with respect to . If the Working Color Space is the same White, then no adjustment is done.

parameters.name: grouptable
parameters.label: Group Names Table
parameters.description: Sources can tag themselves as part of one or more 'Groups'. Fill in rows of this table with the names of one or more groups this node is interested in to limited the 'Sources' listed as available.

parameters.name: audiobuflen
parameters.label: Audio Buffer Length
